name: Akō Rōshi
overview: "Ako Roshi" is a group of 47 former retainers of Lord Asano. Lord Asano was forced to commit suicide after attempting to kill Lord Kira. Once the retainers hear about their Lord's death, they sacrifice their lives to regain the honor of their former master.

trailers.title: 【1964年大河ドラマ 赤穂浪士】のオープニングをフリー素材だけで作ってみた
